title: Botanical
description: Welcome to Botanical! This mod adds real-world plants to Minecraft, offering new benefits and challenges. Heal with Aloe Vera, but be careful—more dangerous plants await!
body: Step into a world where plants can either aid or challenge you with the "Botanical" mod. Featuring real-life plants, each with unique properties, this mod adds new dimensions to survival. Use Aloe Vera to heal your wounds with a brief regeneration effect, but remember—it only lasts until you take damage. As you explore, you'll discover many more plants, each with its own role in your adventure.
